page: Microsoft Azure M48ds_1_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MDSMediumMemoryv3 server family. It is powered by an Intel processor with an x86_64 architecture, offering 48 dedicated vCPUs. The server is configured with 974.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of approximately 20.29 GB per core. Virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server configuration includes 410 GB of local storage and is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external storage volumes. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The hardware profile represents a high-density resource allocation designed for memory-bound workloads rather than compute-intensive or graphics-accelerated tasks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the M48ds_1_v3 offers a high density of RAM relative to its CPU core count, making it a specialized choice for workloads where memory capacity is the primary constraint. This resource distribution is suitable for large in-memory databases, enterprise relational database management systems, heavy data caching layers, and large-scale enterprise resource planning applications.
description: Microsoft Azure M48ds_1_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MDSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel x86_64 processor and is equipped with 974.0 GB of system memory, providing a high ratio of 20.29 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 410 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for high-performance disk configurations, though it lacks dedicated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This high-density memory allocation makes the server qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound enterprise applications rather than raw compute or graphics processing. The M48ds_1_v3 is engineered for demanding workloads such as large-scale in-memory databases, data caching layers, and enterprise relational databases.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel processors and local storage for demanding enterprise database workloads.
